title: Ornith (35B,9B) + Hermes,Zed: THE FULLY PRIVATE LOCAL AGENT is ACTUALLY HERE!
summary: Ornith is a new family of open agentic coding models from DeepReinforce available in sizes from 9B to 397B parameters, built on Gemma and Qwen foundations. The models are designed for coding, tool use, and agentic workflows, with MIT licensing and GGUF versions for local deployment. The 35B variant shows strong practical performance for local agent applications.
writeup: The video covers Ornith, a new family of open agentic coding models from DeepReinforce, ranging from 9B to 397B parameters and built on Gemma and Qwen foundations. It focuses on running these models locally for private agent workflows, pairing them with Hermes and the Zed editor. Key takeaways: the models target coding, tool use, and agentic tasks, ship under MIT licensing with GGUF versions for local deployment, and the 35B variant delivers strong practical performance for local agent applications.
